member.name: T:Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.IPrimeTraceIdService
member.summary: Encodes and Decodes a unit's execution path.

member.name: M:Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.IPrimeTraceIdService.GetEncodedTrace(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.TraceElement})
member.summary: Encode a unit's execution-path into a string. the string can be used to be printed to the iTUFF and be uploaded safely to databases [A-Z,2-7]
member.param:
The execution path for a single unit.
All of the path elements must be from the initial flow-items provided in the constructor

member.name: M:Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.IPrimeTraceIdService.GetDecodedTrace(System.String,System.Version)
member.summary:
Decode a unit's execution-path from a string.
The encoded trace will be logical ONLY IF the same set of flow-items where supplied to the service.
You can validate it by calling the method.
member.param: The encoded unit's trace. only strings that created by this service, will be parsed correctly.

member.name: M:Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.IPrimeTraceIdService.GetTpChecksum
member.summary: Gets a checksum, that can be used to sign TP flowItems where not changed between and .
member.returns: TP Checksum. A string that represents all of the TP flow-items

member.name: T:Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.PrimeTraceIdService
member.summary: Encodes and Decodes a unit's execution path.

member.name: M:Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.PrimeTraceIdService.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.param: All of the test instances' item paths that are in the test-program, for a given flow (= MAIN, INIT, etc.)

member.name: M:Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.PrimeTraceIdService.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.ValueTuple{System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.Enums.ElementType,Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.Enums.PredefinedFlowName}})
member.param: All of the flow item paths that are in the test-program, for a given flow (= MAIN, INIT, etc.) Each flow path consists of list of containing flow items Example; MainFlow;MainModule::MyMainFlow::Item2;MainModule::MySpecialFlow::Item1;MainModule::MyParallelFlow::IPA;IPA::Sample_IP::MyFlow::Item1 (when ; symbolizes new entry to IEnumerable) Input is according to TOS-Prime-TRACE format agreement

member.name: M:Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.PrimeTraceIdService.GetEncodedTrace(System.Collections.Generic.IList{Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.TraceElement})
member.summary: Encode a unit's execution-path into a string. the string can be used to be printed to the iTUFF and be uploaded safely to databases [A-Z,2-7]
member.param:
The execution path for a single unit.
All of the path elements must be from the initial flow-items provided in the constructor

member.name: M:Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.PrimeTraceIdService.Encode``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Int32,Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.EncryptingMap{``0})
member.summary: Example input: TP-flow-items: [0,1,2,3,4,5] map.KeyLength = 3 Unit's-trace: [1 , 2, 3, 1, 2, 3, 5, 4, 0] length 9 keys: [001, 010, 011, 001, 010, 011, 101, 100, 000] 9 * 3 = 27bits + add 3 bits for the keyedTrace: [010 001 01][0 011 001 0][10 011 101][100 000 PP] lastBytePaddingCount = 2 (as 27 + 3 need 2 bits to get to the next multiple of 8 (byte-size)

member.name: M:Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.PrimeTraceIdService.GetDecodedTrace(System.String,System.Version)
member.summary:
Decode a unit's execution-path from a string.
The encoded trace will be logical ONLY IF the same set of flow-items where supplied to the service.
You can validate it by calling the method.
member.param: The encoded unit's trace. only strings that created by this service, will be parsed correctly.

member.name: M:Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.PrimeTraceIdService.Decode``1(System.String,Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.EncryptingMap{``0})
member.summary:
The opposite of the Encode phase. See the example there for better clarity on the algorithm.
The explanation is much more elaborated there.

member.name: M:Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.PrimeTraceIdService.GetTpChecksum
member.summary: Gets a checksum, that can be used to sign TP flowItems where not changed between and .
member.returns: TP Checksum. A string that represents all of the TP flow-items

member.name: M:Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.TraceElement.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Int16,Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.Enums.ElementType,Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.Enums.PredefinedFlowName)
member.summary: TOS formal flow item path MainFlow;MainModule::MyMainFlow::Item2;MainModule::MySpecialFlow::Item1;MainModule::MyParallelFlow::IPA;IPA::Sample_IP::MyFlow::Item1 (when ; symbolizes new entry to IEnumerable)

member.name: T:Trace.PrimeTraceId.Service.TraceIdComparer
member.summary: Case insensitive string comparer where order is '/', '_', '[0-9]', '[a-z|A-Z]'
